name: Gentle hydrating cleanser
label: Gentle hydrating cleanser
note: Lukewarm water, morning and night. Skin should feel clean, never tight.

name: Balancing gel cleanser
label: Balancing gel cleanser
note: A fresh, balancing cleanse that won't strip your skin.

name: Salicylic acid cleanser
label: Salicylic acid cleanser
note: A BHA cleanser keeps pores clear; ease off if skin feels dry. Rinse-off use is generally considered fine in pregnancy.

name: Vitamin C serum
label: Vitamin C serum
note: A few drops after cleansing for antioxidant brightening, it also boosts your sunscreen.

name: Niacinamide serum
label: Niacinamide serum
note: Calms redness, balances oil and is gentle enough for reactive skin.

name: Benzoyl peroxide
label: Benzoyl peroxide
note: A proven first-line for breakouts, a thin layer on blemish-prone areas. It can bleach fabric, so let it dry.

name: Hyaluronic acid serum
label: Hyaluronic acid serum
note: Smooth onto damp skin, then seal with moisturizer. Lovely under the eyes too.

name: Ceramide moisturizer
label: Ceramide moisturizer
note: Strengthens the skin barrier; layer a richer amount at night.

name: Lightweight gel moisturizer
label: Lightweight gel moisturizer
note: Comfortable hydration without heaviness or clogged pores.

name: Broad-spectrum SPF 30+
label: Broad-spectrum SPF 30+
note: Every morning, rain or shine, the single most important step for preventing dark spots and ageing, and essential after every treatment. Reapply every 2 hours in the sun. A mineral (zinc/titanium) formula suits sensitive or pregnant skin and deeper skin tones.

name: Retinol / retinoid
label: Retinol / retinoid
note: The most proven anti-ageing and acne active. Start 2 nights a week, pea-sized, and build up. Always wear morning SPF, and don't layer it with benzoyl peroxide the same night.

name: Bakuchiol serum
label: Bakuchiol serum
note: A gentle, plant-based alternative to retinol, a good choice for sensitive skin or during pregnancy.

name: Azelaic acid
label: Azelaic acid
note: Calms redness and fades dark marks, and is well tolerated, including during pregnancy.

name: Salicylic acid (BHA)
label: Salicylic acid (BHA)
note: Unclogs pores on breakout-prone nights; alternate with your retinoid rather than using both at once.

name: Weekly AHA exfoliation
label: Weekly AHA exfoliation
note: Once or twice a week for smooth, bright skin, not the same night as your retinoid.

name: Hydrating mask
label: Hydrating mask
note: A weekly drink of water for the skin, soothing and barrier-loving.
